subject: Re: estimate
body:
where are you?

where are you?

--- jeanluc brunel jeanlucbrunel@msn.com wrote:

I am sending you what you have been asking me.
I also think that as J E finances the company and
that I do not have the
money to guarantee his loan, he should retain in
some way the majority of
the shares until he gets his money back.
I will speak with him about it
The 51% could be a company where shares are non
nominatives
you know better than me what to do.
Thanks
JL

also I will speak with you later today or tomorrow
concerning contract with
